title: Shiny copper gholdengo (Cobblemon)
description: This resourcepack replaces gholdengho's shiny form with a copper palette.
body:
This resourcepack replaces the shiny of gholdengo with a copper version.

![Shows the copper shiny gholdengo and the shiny with a full netherite coat.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7040bb041e5476d0d606c87b1cd9ff9c8e823694.png)
